name: Vybes Villa
overview: 10 singles from the Vybes App move into one villa for 7 days and blind date… with $25,000 on the line, they’ll face iconic challenges like Spin the Chair, Pop The Balloon, Lie Detector with John, and more fan-favorite videos from the Zach Justice YouTube channel.

trailers.title: 10 Singles Blind Date for 100 Hours | Vybes Villa Trailer
